$comment: Self-guard for authoring THIS plugin repo. Consumed by the INSTALLED psotobverse-utils nothing_loose PreToolUse hook (user-scoped) via $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR when a session is rooted here. FAILS OPEN if absent. datavidence-healthanalysis ships no nothing_loose of its own — it reuses the generic guard (orthogonality). allow_write = globs where the agent may Write/Edit. Add a path here if the repo grows a new top-level location.
